pdfData.text: The TLP shown in § Figure L-1, when processed using the Key and IV shown in § Table L-1, which also includes other relevant inputs and outputs, yields the IDE TLP shown in § Figure L-2.
§ Figure L-1 Example Memory Write TLP
Table L-1 Inputs and Outputs for Example IDE TLP

pdfData.table_body:
Input/Outputs variables for AES GCMValues Byte0 [7:0] byte 1 [15:8] ...... Byte NKey, IV, MAC : Follows AES-GCM Specification with Most significant leftmost
Inputs
Key (K)8A 95 85 8A 23 1D 41 4A 37 33 F0 E5 7A F6 AE 77 C7 F0 CF BA 75 54 D6 70 83 34 2A 64 2A EF 9D 5D
Initialization Vector (IV)01 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
A92 00 BC 0C 60 00 00 04 AB CD 00 FF 00 00 00 01 00 00 00 00
P (including PCRC)00 01 02 03 04 05 06 07 08 09 0A 0B 0C 0D 0E 0F 88 E2 CE CE
Outputs
C (including encrypted PCRC)0C F7 B4 8F E6 30 D7 18 CE B9 F4 23 DE EB 68 53 7C DF 22 EE
MAC53 A7 D7 13 7F 48 1E 7E FB 97 E8 C6
